## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing conventions (full braces, nullable enabled, no top-level statements)
- [ ] AOT-compatible (no unconstrained reflection)
- [ ] Output formatting is in the class library, not the console app
- [ ] Summary output goes to stderr
- [ ] `NO_COLOR` respected for any new colour output
- [ ] README updated if flags/options/behaviour changed
